segments.text: You cannot wait [music] for favorable
conditions to summon your skill. I
started feeling [music] a little uneasy
and what what started as a little
feeling of uneasiness quickly turned
into a full-blown migraine for [music]
me. And I I suffer from migraines and if
you've had migraines, you know how bad
they are. You can't think [music]
straight. You can't do anything. You
can't go back to sleep. There was no
option. There was no choice. I remember
telling myself, it does not matter that
you have a migraine. It does not matter
that you're unwell. It does not matter
what you went through last night. The
audience there is there to learn
something today and you [music] need to
show up. So I don't know from where I
just summoned all my skill and I took it
with me onto that stage and that ended
[music] up being one of my best talks
ever.
